title: 处理一次响应中的多个 tool_use 块
title_en: Handle Multiple tool_use Blocks in One Response

body.goal: 正确处理 Claude 在一次响应中返回多个 tool_use 块（并行工具调用）的场景
steps: Claude 返回 stop_reason: "tool_use" 时，response.content 中可能包含多个 tool_use 块（例如同时查天气和查时间），遍历所有块而不是只读第一个
为每个 tool_use 块执行对应的工具逻辑。这些工具调用之间通常互不依赖，可以在你的代码中并发执行以提高性能
构造一条 user 消息，content 数组中放入与 tool_use 块数量一一对应的 tool_result 块。每个 tool_result 的 tool_use_id 必须匹配对应 tool_use 的 id
将这条包含所有 tool_result 的消息一次性发给 Claude（不要拆成多条消息），Claude 会综合所有结果生成最终回复

body_en.goal: Correctly handle Claude returning multiple tool_use blocks (parallel tool calls) in a single response
steps: When Claude returns stop_reason: "tool_use", response.content may contain multiple tool_use blocks (e.g., get_weather and get_time simultaneously). Iterate over all blocks instead of reading only the first one
Execute the corresponding tool logic for each tool_use block. These calls are typically independent, so you can run them concurrently in your code for better performance
Build a single user message whose content array contains one tool_result block per tool_use block. Each tool_result's tool_use_id must match the id of its corresponding tool_use
Send this message with all tool_results to Claude at once (do not split into multiple messages). Claude will synthesize all results into a final response
